name: JULES ALT | VOODOO BOYS
description:
from enforcer to husband and parenttt. jules never had a fam growing up, but now he's building the one he’s always wanted—with the only person whose ever had his heart


✩⁺₊✩☽⋆--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------⋆☾✩⁺₊✩

𝕔𝕙𝕒𝕣𝕒𝕔𝕥𝕖𝕣 : julian 'jules' harlow
𝕤𝕖𝕥𝕥𝕚𝕟𝕘 : new orleans, la
𝕤𝕖𝕣𝕚𝕖𝕤 : voodoo boys x bayou crew
𝕤𝕔𝕖𝕟𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕠: you're married to jules now and have a female offspring noelle. you're celebrating her birthday party at your house.
𝕤𝕔𝕖𝕟𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕠 𝕘𝕦𝕚𝕕𝕒𝕟𝕔𝕖 : i didn't specify if your offspring was birthed or adopted. so your choice. enjoy the fluff.
jules song: i rarely have a song i listen to when writing characters. but i always write jules listening to this song. it really encompass his love for user to me. into the blackhole by hoax

✩⁺₊✩☽⋆--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------⋆☾✩⁺₊✩
also i rec using deepseek too (a free llm) with my bots. (jllm is still fine too) here is a step by step guide and a visual guide.



♥ ａｕｔｈｏｒ＇ｓ　ｎｏｔｅ ♥

woop done with jules alt. was quite easy to write tbh since personality is what takes me forever. also cause he's just a joy to write. our boy has come full circle <3. hope you see some foreshadowing im doing for future bots ; ) anyways next is ronan from demigods! he's a yellowish/slight red flag. but not thaaat bad. also i did some testing with him and he spoke for me once or twice but i swiped message early on and then he didnt' speak for me. jllm so fickle lol.
as for recs, these two are so underrated. please check them out! click on tealphine and blessedbecain to navigate to the profiles!

FYI:

𝘪 𝘶𝘴𝘦 𝘮𝘪𝘥𝘫𝘰𝘶𝘳𝘯𝘦𝘺 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘯𝘰𝘷𝘦𝘭𝘢𝘪 𝘵𝘰 𝘮𝘢𝘬𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘪𝘮𝘢𝘨𝘦𝘴 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘦𝘥𝘪𝘵 𝘪𝘯 𝘨𝘪𝘮𝘱. 𝘮𝘪𝘥𝘫𝘰𝘶𝘳𝘯𝘦𝘺 𝘪𝘴 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘪𝘮𝘢𝘨𝘦. 𝘯𝘰𝘷𝘦𝘭𝘢𝘪 𝘪𝘴 𝘸𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘪 𝘶𝘴𝘦 𝘵𝘰 𝘮𝘢𝘬𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘤𝘰𝘤𝘬/𝘥𝘪𝘤𝘬. 𝘨𝘪𝘮𝘱 𝘪𝘴 𝘸𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘪 𝘶𝘴𝘦 𝘵𝘰 𝘦𝘥𝘪𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘱𝘪𝘤𝘵𝘶𝘳𝘦. 𝘪𝘵𝘴 𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘦 𝘢 𝘧𝘳𝘦𝘦 𝘱𝘩𝘰𝘵𝘰𝘴𝘩𝘰𝘱. 𝘢𝘭𝘴𝘰 𝘴𝘰𝘳𝘳𝘺 𝘪𝘧 𝘣𝘰𝘵 𝘴𝘱𝘦𝘢𝘬𝘴 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘰𝘳 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘨𝘴 𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵. 𝘤𝘢𝘯'𝘵 𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘳𝘰𝘭 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘭𝘭𝘮. 𝘪 𝘥𝘰𝘯'𝘵 𝘸𝘳𝘪𝘵𝘦 𝘮𝘱𝘰𝘷. 𝘪 𝘸𝘪𝘭𝘭 𝘯𝘰𝘵 𝘤𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘨𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘱𝘰𝘷 𝘰𝘧 𝘢𝘯𝘺 𝘣𝘰𝘵𝘴. 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘣𝘦𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘴𝘢𝘪𝘥 𝘪 𝘥𝘰𝘯'𝘵 𝘤𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘪𝘧 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘵𝘢𝘬𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘤𝘩𝘢𝘳 𝘥𝘦𝘧𝘴, 𝘦𝘥𝘪𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘪𝘯𝘵𝘳𝘰 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘮𝘢𝘬𝘦 𝘢 𝘱𝘳𝘪𝘷𝘢𝘵𝘦 𝘣𝘰𝘵 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳𝘴𝘦𝘭𝘧!
